summary: Completed testing of Data Export and Face Comparison features. Backend: 25/25 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Export Data dialog and Face Comparison dialog both working after model fix.
passed_tests: Export API: GET /api/export/profile?format=json - Returns profile data with stats
Export API: GET /api/export/profile?format=csv - Returns CSV with headers
Export API: GET /api/export/profile?format=pdf - Returns HTML document
Export API: GET /api/export/profile - Invalid token returns 401
Export API: GET /api/export/posts?format=json - Returns posts array
Export API: GET /api/export/posts?format=csv - Returns CSV format
Export API: GET /api/export/posts?format=pdf - Returns HTML format
Export API: GET /api/export/conversations?format=json - Returns conversations with messages
Export API: GET /api/export/conversations?format=csv - Returns CSV format
Export API: GET /api/export/conversations?format=pdf - Returns HTML format
Export API: GET /api/export/all?format=json - Returns complete GDPR export
Export API: GET /api/export/all?format=pdf - Returns summary HTML
Export API: GET /api/export/all - Invalid token returns 401
Face Compare API: GET /api/face-compare/threshold-info - Returns threshold info
Face Compare API: POST /api/face-compare/compare - Valid 128-dim descriptors return similarity
Face Compare API: POST /api/face-compare/compare - Different faces return lower similarity
Face Compare API: POST /api/face-compare/compare - Missing descriptor returns 400
Face Compare API: POST /api/face-compare/compare - Wrong dimensions returns 400
Face Compare API: POST /api/face-compare/compare - Invalid token returns 401
Face Compare API: GET /api/face-compare/history - Returns comparison history
Face Compare API: GET /api/face-compare/history - Invalid token returns 401
Face Compare API: DELETE /api/face-compare/history - Clears history successfully
Export API: Default format is JSON when not specified
Export API: Invalid format returns 422 validation error
Face Compare API: Empty descriptors return 400
Frontend: Settings > Privacy Controls > Export Data button clickable
Frontend: Export Data dialog opens with type selection (Profile, Conversations, Posts, Complete Export)
Frontend: Export format selection shows JSON, CSV, PDF/HTML options
Frontend: Download Export button visible and enabled
Frontend: Settings > Security > FaceScan Settings section visible
Frontend: Face Comparison button in Security section clickable
Frontend: Face Comparison dialog loads with models (after fix)
Frontend: Upload Photo 1 and Photo 2 areas visible
Frontend: Compare Faces button visible and functional
critical_code_review_comments: Data Export APIs properly support all three formats (JSON, CSV, PDF/HTML)
Export endpoints properly handle authentication via token query param
GDPR Complete Export includes all user data types
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing test user.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Data Export and Face Comparison features fully tested. Export Data button in Settings > Privacy Controls. Face Comparison button in Settings > Security > FaceScan Settings. The ssd_mobilenetv1 face-api.js models were missing and have been downloaded to /app/frontend/public/models/.

fix_applied.issue: Face Comparison dialog showing 'Failed to load face detection models' error
fix_applied.root_cause: ssd_mobilenetv1 model files were missing from /app/frontend/public/models/
fix_applied.fix: Downloaded ssd_mobilenetv1_model-weights_manifest.json, ssd_mobilenetv1_model-shard1, ssd_mobilenetv1_model-shard2 from face-api.js CDN
fix_applied.verification: Face Comparison dialog now loads properly with Photo 1, Photo 2 upload areas and Compare Faces button
